storyboard.content: I have a mild burning feeling when I urinate.
I am going to the bathroom to urinate much more often than usual.
My urine looks a little cloudy.
The burning started a few days ago and has stayed about the same — it is not getting worse.
The discomfort is mild and is not stopping me from doing my normal activities.
I am a 28-year-old woman, sexually active, with no previous medical conditions.
I do not have a fever and I have not seen any blood in my urine.
